section.heading: Opposition to loans or funds for countries that support terrorism

content.p: The Secretary of the Treasury shall instruct the United States Executive Director at each of the International Financial Institutions 11 So in original. Probably should not be capitalized. (as defined in section 262r(c)(2) of this title) to use the voice and vote of the United States to oppose the provision of loans or other use of the funds of the respective institution to any country the government of which the Secretary of State has determined, for purposes of section 4605(j) 22 See References in Text note below. of title 50, section 2371 of this title, or section 2780 of this title, to be a government that has repeatedly provided support for acts of international terrorism.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 95–118, title XVI (par.), as added Pub. L. 111–32, title XIV, § 1404, June 24, 2009, 123 Stat. 1919.)

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 4605(j) of title 50, referred to in text, was repealed by Pub. L. 115–232, div. A, title XVII, § 1766(a), Aug. 13, 2018, 132 Stat. 2232.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section is comprised of an undesignated paragraph which was added at the end of title XVI of Pub. L. 95–118.

note.heading: Similar Provisions
note.p: Similar provisions are contained in section 262p–4q of this title.

note.heading: Definitions
note.p: The definitions in section 262p–5 of this title apply to this section.
